summary: TemaDom v10.8 Phase 1 testing completed successfully. All new features working: Homepage with hero banner, 4 demo projects, AI Designer promo, stats row. New pages (Ads, AI Designer, Subscriptions) fully functional with test mode pricing. Registration has 4 user types (Client, Company, Designer, Master). All 25 backend API tests passed.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/subscriptions/plans returns 200 with test_mode=true
✅ Backend: Subscription plans structure (company: basic/pro/premium, designer: designer)
✅ Backend: GET /api/demo-projects returns 4 demo projects with required fields
✅ Backend: GET /api/ai-design/status returns 200 with 100/100 free counter
✅ Backend: GET /api/top-companies returns 200 with companies list
✅ Backend: GET /api/ads returns 200 with ads list structure
✅ Backend: POST /api/ads requires authentication (401)
✅ Backend: POST /api/ads with auth creates ad successfully
✅ Backend: User registration with user_type='designer' succeeds
✅ Backend: User registration with user_type='client' succeeds
✅ Backend: User registration with user_type='master' succeeds
✅ Backend: Company registration requires bulstat (9 digits)
✅ Backend: Company registration with bulstat succeeds
✅ Backend: POST /api/reviews/check approves clean comments
✅ Backend: GET /api/stats returns required fields
✅ Backend: GET /api/referrals/status requires authentication
✅ Frontend: Homepage hero shows 'ПЪРВИ 20 ФИРМИ = 1 МЕСЕЦ ПРО ТЕСТОВ РЕЖИМ' banner
✅ Frontend: Homepage stats row (Фирми, Проекти, Области: 28, Отзиви)
✅ Frontend: AI Designer promo section 'Първите 100 AI дизайна — БЕЗПЛАТНИ'
✅ Frontend: 4 demo projects cards displayed with budgets
✅ Frontend: 'Как работи' section with 4 steps (Калкулатор, AI Дизайнер, Намери фирма, Оценка)
✅ Frontend: Navbar - Главна, Калкулатор, Фирми, Дизайнери, Обяви links
✅ Frontend: Navbar 'Още' dropdown with 6 items (AI Дизайнер, Проекти, Услуги, Професии, Блог, За нас)
✅ Frontend: Ads page (/ads) shows test mode banner and '+ Нова обява' button
✅ Frontend: AI Designer page (/ai-designer) shows 100/100 counter and 3 variants with Тестов режим
✅ Frontend: Subscriptions page (/subscriptions) shows company plans (Базов/Про/Премиум) and designer plan
✅ Frontend: Registration page has 4 tabs (Клиент, Фирма, Дизайнер, Майстор)
critical_code_review_comments: All v10.8 Phase 1 features implemented correctly
Test mode flag (TEST_MODE=True) consistently applied across all pricing displays
AI Designer page is a showcase - actual generation not implemented (planned for Phase 3)
get_optional_user dependency correctly allows unauthenticated access to /api/ai-design/status
seed_data_creation: Test ads and users created via pytest for API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: TemaDom v10.8 Phase 1 fully tested. New pages: /ads (listings), /ai-designer (showcase), /subscriptions (plans). Homepage redesigned with hero banner, 4 demo projects, AI promo, How it works section. Registration supports 4 user types. All prices shown as 'Тестов режим'. Backend endpoints: /api/subscriptions/plans, /api/demo-projects, /api/ai-design/status, /api/ads, /api/top-companies, /api/referrals/status, /api/reviews/check all working.

homepage_hero.details: Hero banner 'ПЪРВИ 20 ФИРМИ = 1 МЕСЕЦ ПРО ТЕСТОВ РЕЖИМ', stats row showing Фирми/Проекти/Области(28)/Отзиви

ai_designer_promo.details: Purple promo section with 'Първите 100 AI дизайна — БЕЗПЛАТНИ' text

demo_projects.details: 4 demo project cards: Ремонт апартамент (8,928€), Вътрешен дизайн (3,500€), Баня (5,200€), Кухня (7,100€)

how_it_works.details: 4 steps: Калкулатор, AI Дизайнер, Намери фирма, Оценка

navbar.details: Main items: Главна, Калкулатор, Фирми, Дизайнери, Обяви. Dropdown 'Още' contains: AI Дизайнер, Проекти, Услуги, Професии, Блог, За нас

ads_page.details: Test mode banner visible, '+ Нова обява' create button present, ads list displayed

ai_designer_page.details: 100/100 free counter, 3 variants (Вариант 1/3/5) with 'Тестов режим' pricing

subscriptions_page.details: Company plans (Базов/Про/Премиум) and Designer plan, all with 'Тестов режим' pricing

registration_4_types.details: 4 tabs: Клиент, Фирма, Дизайнер, Майстор. Company requires 9-digit bulstat

backend_apis.details: All 25 API tests passed: subscriptions/plans, demo-projects, ai-design/status, ads CRUD, auth/register, reviews/check, top-companies, stats, referrals
